Class MeteorsCheckShipState

java.lang.Object
Controller.State
Controller.MeteorsSwarm.MeteorsCheckShipState
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MeteorsCheckShipState extends State
Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after being hit by meteors during the meteors swarm phase of the game.

This state allows a player to remove components from their ship and checks if the ship remains intact after the removal.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

  • Method Details

    • deleteComponent

      public void deleteComponent(String playerName, Coordinates coordinates) throws InvalidMethodParameters, InvalidParameters
      Deletes a component from the player's ship at the specified coordinates.

      Validates that it is the correct player's turn, that the coordinates are not null, and that a component exists at those coordinates. If all checks pass, the component is removed, and the player receives junk. The game state is then updated based on the ship's integrity.

      Overrides:
      deleteComponent in class State
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player attempting to delete a component
      coordinates - the coordinates of the component to be deleted
      Throws:
      InvalidMethodParameters - if any input is null or structurally invalid
      InvalidParameters - if it is not the player's turn or if no component exists at the given coordinates

    • getAvailableCommands

      public List<String> getAvailableCommands()
      Specified by:
      getAvailableCommands in class State
